summary: Tested Universal Conversion Analysis feature. All 8 backend tests passed. All UI features verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/ingredients/{id}/conversion-analysis returns correct structure for ingredients with linked recipes
Backend: linked_products_count is correct (Pollo Entero has 3 linked recipes)

Backend: Each linked recipe has all required fields (recipe_id, product_id, product_name, product_price, quantity_used, unit, waste_percentage, cost_per_unit, base_ingredient_cost, cost_with_waste, cost_formula)
Backend: Cost calculation formula verified: (costo_compra ÷ factor) × cantidad × (1 + merma%)
Backend: total_cost_impact is the sum of all recipe costs with waste
Backend: Returns empty linked_recipes array for ingredients with no recipes (Ron Brugal)
Backend: Returns 404 for invalid ingredient ID
Backend: Conversion factor works correctly (Queso Mozzarella factor 16 divides cost properly)
Frontend: Green calculator button visible on each ingredient row (8 buttons found)
Frontend: Calculator button has data-testid='conversion-analysis-btn-{id}' for testing
Frontend: Dialog opens with title 'Análisis de Conversión Universal'
Frontend: Dialog shows ingredient name and category badge
Frontend: LÓGICA DE CONVERSIÓN section shows purchase unit, cost, factor arrow, dispatch unit, and dispatch cost
Frontend: Shows conversion explanation '1 [unidad compra] = N [unidad despacho]'
Frontend: Productos Vinculados section lists all linked recipes with correct count
Frontend: Each linked product shows: name, quantity used, unit, waste%, PVP, calculated cost
Frontend: Cost formula breakdown shows in each recipe row
Frontend: Impacto Total shows sum of all recipe costs
Frontend: Fórmula de Costo Dinámico section explains the calculation
Frontend: Empty state shows helpful message when no linked recipes exist

Queso Mozzarella.note: Used to verify factor division in cost calculation

context_for_next_testing_agent: Universal Conversion Analysis feature fully working. Key endpoint: GET /api/ingredients/{id}/conversion-analysis. Returns ingredient conversion info (purchase_unit, dispatch_unit, conversion_factor, costs) and all linked recipes with calculated costs. Cost formula: (costo_compra ÷ factor) × cantidad × (1 + merma%). Calculator button is emerald green, located in each ingredient row actions with data-testid. Dialog shows conversion logic visualization with arrows and 'Productos Vinculados' list.

calculator_button.location: Inventory Manager -> Insumos tab -> each ingredient row
calculator_button.styling: emerald-500 green color, h-8 w-8 size

conversion_dialog.title: Análisis de Conversión Universal
sections: Ingredient header with name and category badge
LÓGICA DE CONVERSIÓN with purchase/dispatch visualization
Impacto Total showing sum of costs

empty_state.message: Este insumo no está vinculado a ninguna receta
empty_state.help_text: Ve a la pestaña 'Recetas' para crear un vínculo

returns.linked_products_count: Number of recipes using this ingredient
returns.linked_recipes: Array of recipes with cost calculations
